rationale: The citing paper is a conceptual editorial about how to write “sticky” JMR articles and explicitly says it uses June 2008 issue papers as illustrations across method/theory/market stories, which makes this same-issue empirical article likely an example rather than a theory/method source. The matched evidence is only a DOI-level reference entry with no in-text context, and nothing in the notes indicates substantive reliance on the cited paper’s art-infusion mechanism.
